title: koeleria scabriuscula
intro: Koeleria scabriuscula is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass found in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koeleria scabriuscula include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Koeleria scabriuscula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
